items.title: Analyze signal accuracy trends over last 7 days and identify top 3 best/worst performing causal categories
items.notes: Completed 2026-03-01: 7-day analysis generated in projects/market-intel/notes/accuracy-trend-7d-2026-03-01.md. Data currently insufficient for valid top-3 best/worst ranking (only 1 verified signal). Next: clear verification backlog (3 geopolitical, 1 macroeconomic pending) then rerun ranking.

items.title: Implement quick-fix for js_blob artifact class in article excerpt enrichment
items.notes: Quick win from audit findings; strip obvious JS blob patterns from fetched excerpts.
items.completion_note: Implemented js_blob guardrails for article excerpt enrichment in rss_monitor and news-reader feed transform; verified with sample Closure-library blob that excerpt is dropped from output.

items.title: Create database schema draft for Horizons PMS (rooms, bookings, guests, rates tables)
items.notes: From TASKS.md backlog; requires design doc before implementation.
items.completion_note: Created Phase 1 schema draft at projects/horizons-pms/db/schema.sql with rooms/bookings/guests/rates (+ room_types lookup), constraints, FKs, overlap prevention, indexes, and design notes in projects/horizons-pms/db/README.md.
